pipeline_mode.provenance: Phase 0 analysis: confidence 0.94 > threshold 0.7, fast-track eligible
jit.enabled.provenance: Fast-track mode — no JIT needed, all phases predetermined
replanning.enabled.provenance: Fast-track: task is well-specified, no replanning expected
routing.enabled.provenance: No template routing needed — direct execution
verification.dimension_weights.provenanc: Adjusted: security low (pure markdown), correctness high (must match roadmap spec), spec_alignment high (roadmap is the spec)
skip_phases.provenance: Fast-track: skip research (1,2), brainstorm (3), TDD (5 — no testable code). Keep: spec (4), plan (6), execute (7), verify (8), completion (9)
approval_gates.provenance: Reduced from [3,4,6]: gate 3 (brainstorm) skipped. Keep spec (4) and plan (6) gates for user confirmation
oracle.enabled.provenance: Default L1 — keep oracle for verification
